function.name: run_analysis
function.description: Run a spectrometer analysis on a sample.

function.name: run_separation
function.description: Run centrifuge separation on a material.

function.name: run_bioassay
function.description: Run biological activity test on the compound using cell cultures. No instrument required. Can fail if reaction conditions are suboptimal.

cell_type.description: Type of cell culture to use

function.name: run_synthesis
function.description: Run chemical synthesis in the fume hood.

function.name: verify_result
function.description: Verify a scientist's result by inspecting sample conditions and running confirmation analysis. Can reject, requiring the scientist to redo work.
